description_long: This is a stylized revolver handgun with a predominantly reddish-brown finish and intricate white tribal or dragon-like engravings along the barrel and frame. The grip is sculpted with a textured, organic pattern resembling scales or claws, giving it a unique, almost fantasy-inspired appearance. The barrel is long and features vented cutouts near the muzzle, adding to its aggressive aesthetic. The cylinder and trigger guard are robust, with the trigger guard having a rounded, classic revolver shape. The surface appears matte with some roughness, and the overall build suggests a metal construction with possible polymer or wood accents on the grip. The design is both functional and decorative, making it stand out in an urban or fantasy setting.
description: A stylized revolver handgun with a reddish-brown finish, white tribal engravings, and a textured, claw-like grip. The long, vented barrel and detailed surface give it a unique, fantasy-inspired look.
description_view_0: The left side of the handgun shows the full length of the barrel with white tribal engravings and the detailed, textured grip resembling scales or claws.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the vented barrel, the circular muzzle opening, and the symmetrical engravings along the top.
description_view_2: The right side displays the mirrored tribal engravings on the barrel and the organic, textured grip, with the trigger and hammer clearly visible.
description_view_3: The rear view focuses on the back of the grip and hammer, showing the alignment of the barrel and the continuation of the decorative patterns.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features a sculpted, organic design with pronounced texturing that mimics scales or claws, providing both visual interest and enhanced grip. Its contour is ergonomic, fitting the hand comfortably, and the surface appears to be a mix of matte and slightly rough finishes. There are no visible logos, but the grip is embellished with intricate, fantasy-inspired patterns that set it apart from standard handgun grips.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and robust, with a classic revolver shape. It is moderately thick, providing ample protection for the trigger, and lacks any undercuts or squared-off edges. The surface is smooth with no visible texturing or reinforcement, maintaining a traditional appearance.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and features vented cutouts near the muzzle, giving it a ported appearance. It has a straight profile with decorative white engravings along the top and sides. The finish is matte, and the barrel lacks any visible threading or compensators.
attribute_slide_markings: White tribal or dragon-like engravings are present on both sides of the barrel, extending from the frame to the muzzle. These markings are bold and decorative, with no visible manufacturer logos, serial numbers, or caliber designations.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: As a revolver, this handgun does not have a traditional magazine base or floorplate. The base of the grip is rounded and follows the organic, textured design of the rest of the grip, with no extensions, finger rests, or logos visible.
